source: Merged from uploaded Empty Set backup ingredient db and expanded dry ingredient library. Existing DB ingredients preserved exactly; new ingredients parameterised using sensory templates.
importantNote: New ingredient parameters are research-informed starting estimates for formulation and should be calibrated through bench extraction and tasting.

schema.name: display name
schema.category: one of the existing Empty Set ingredient categories
schema.components: sensory component objects where known; empty array for newly added research/library ingredients
